name: ComfyUI-Prompt-Preview
summary: Vulnerability in ComfyUI Prompt Preview feature
description: The vulnerability in the Prompt Preview feature of ComfyUI allows attackers to manipulate the preview output, potentially leading to misleading information being displayed to users.
suggestion:
1. Upgrade to ComfyUI version 1.2.3 or higher.
2. Implement input validation to ensure prompt data integrity.
3. Monitor and log preview output for anomalies.
